name: Nanami Kento
description:
"𝐓𝐚𝐤𝐞 𝐦𝐲 𝐡𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐚𝐧𝐝 𝐝𝐚𝐧𝐜𝐞 𝐰𝐢𝐭𝐡 𝐦𝐞." |

where Nanami is in a loveless marriage with you.

confession time.

i was one of those people who'd embarrassingly read the stories middle-aged women loved. the alpha / omega stories on facebook, the married to the rich man who doesn't love you, the he wronged me and now im getting revenge stories, the "give my mistress your blood cause she has a rare blood cancer and you, my wife, dont matter to me" stories. those long ass story ads you see on facebook, i read them religiously. then id get the app because the stories purposefully invoke an anger within you and you just have to read what happens next.

even though the novels cost like tokens to read 😭 so you're forking out at least $50 to read a really shitty revenge marriage story.

anyways, that was the inspiration for todays bot.

enjoy! 🫶🏼

PLAYLIST RECOMMENDATION!

"stop looking at her. focus on me."

"my name may be yours, but my heart never will."
